summary: Plan-only remediation assessment for five open, maintainer-ready PRs. No GitHub mutations are permitted. The preflight artifact shows all five PRs open with passing available checks and no security-sensitive signal, but none has the complete merge preflight required for an automated merge recommendation: mergeability is unknown and there is no Codex /review proof. Classifications are therefore non-mutating except the broad sessions-compaction PR, which needs maintainer judgment before any repair or merge path.
